text_block_list.text:
Today's our day off, so I decide to visit a café Curren was talking
about on Umastagram.

I'm hoping it will give me some new insight into what kind of person
she is behind the scenes. There's just one problem...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Mm! ♪ Yum, yum! ♪ Nothing makes me happier than a parfait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whew, I finished that thing quick. What a shame.
It seems like Curren also picked today to pay this cafe a visit. At least it doesn't look like she's noticed me yet...
choice_data_list: (I'll just keep an eye on her for now...)

text_block_list.text:
I do feel a bit weird about this, but it's also a perfect chance for me
to learn something about her mysterious private life.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ooookay! ♪ Think it's about time I went shopping.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow, this dress is so cute! ♪ I looove deep reds!

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk
text_block_list.text: I take it you're a fan of darker colors? They suit you well.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks a bunch! ♪ I'm a fan of how darker colors really show
off your skin tones.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Like I remember this one time, in an elementary school presentation, I
went for a magenta look for just that reason! And when I was four, I
think I wore violet?

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk
text_block_list.text: You—you utilized contrast in your outfit at the age of four?! That's the Curren for you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I've made up my mind! I'll take this dress.

After that, Curren continues shopping, heading from one shop to the
next.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow, so cuuute! A cat plushie! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Curren Chan, take me with you!" Hm, should I bring you home? What
to do?

text_block_list.name: Random Passerby
text_block_list.text: Mm? Urk! Ngh?! S-s-so cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm? Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Random Passerby
text_block_list.text:
A g-g-goddess? Or... an angel? No, wait... have I just opened my eyes
truly for the very first time?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you look enlightened. Welcome to your new, Currentastic
world! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm on Umastagram, so I'd love it if you followed me at @Curren! ♪

text_block_list.name: Random Passerby
text_block_list.text: As... you wish! Cute... Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks sooo much! ♪

...I get it now. She doesn't have any notion of separating her public
and private lives. No matter when or where, she's always living in the
cutest way she knows how.
choice_data_list: (...What am I even doing right now?)
(...What am I even doing right now?)

text_block_list.text:
Feeling embarrassed at myself for trailing her in secret when she has
nothing to hide, I make up my mind to apologize to her and—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So? Big Bro, when are you going to talk to me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So? Big Sis, when are you going to talk to me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, I've been waiting for you, you know? You're such a naughty
tease, Big Bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, I've been waiting for you, you know? You're such a naughty
tease, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Want to get some fresh air?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro... you don't trust me, do you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis... you don't trust me, do you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Today, you spied on me... because you wanted to know more about
me, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm glad you're curious and all. It's just... I like to choose what
side of me people see.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I pick out only the cutest moments to show everyone. And if that
leaves the "real" me a mystery, well... that's just part of my charm.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Make sense? I want you looking at the parts of me you'll love. I want
you to love "Curren Chan."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Make sense? I want you looking at the parts of me you'll love. I want
you to love "Curren Chan."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay? You can do that, right? Pretty please?

...If I were in any other position, I might be willing to do as she asks. It
might even be the happiest option for both of us. But...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: It's not okay, because I'm your trainer.
It's not okay, because I'm your trainer.

text_block_list.text:
It's my job to make her dreams come true. And to do that, I need to
see beyond the charming image she shows the world.
choice_data_list: I want you to tell me more about yourself.
I want you to tell me more about yourself.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...You hate losing just as much as I do.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All right. I'll consider it an eensy bit. I mean, you did want to know so badly that you started stalking me and all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, then I suppose I'll... forgive you! ♪ After all, you're in love
with me, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, then I suppose I'll... forgive you! ♪ After all, you're in love
with me, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's with that reaction? Then... do you hate me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha, you mean you love me, right? ♪ And you know what? I think I might just...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...not finish that sentence just yet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
How about this—if you go on a date with me... then maybe I'll tell you
what I was about to say!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And you might learn more about me, too! So? What'll it be, Big Bro?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And you might learn more about me, too! So? What'll it be, Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha, yay! ♪ It's a date, then! ♪ There—got your arm!

I spend the rest of the day with a pleased Curren. Somehow, I feel
like today's events have brought us a little closer...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro, I could go for a caffe latte right about now! So, pleeease! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis, I could go for a caffe latte right about now! So, pleeease! ♪
...But then again, maybe not.
